name: Beachside Bloodbath
short_description: You arrive at a quaint beach house in a small New Jersey town for an idyllic weekend getaway with friends, but little do you know what horrors await... First person survival horror experience in a stylized PS1 / VHS-era aesthetic.
detailed_description:
Low tide, high body count...


Step into the shoes of a vacationer in the late 1990s, arriving at a quaint beach house in a small shore town along the New Jersey coast. You're here to meet up with three friends for a calm weekend getaway, but little do you know what horrors await...

As you arrive in this sleepy coastal town, you uncover a web of mystery and fear that will test your wits and nerves. Someone, or something, doesn't want you to be here...

  • Explore the atmospheric shore town to unravel its mysteries

  • Solve first person inventory-based puzzles to progress the story

  • Interact with eccentric locals to gain useful information

  • Evade any threats by blending into shadows or sprinting for safety

  • Hand crafted VHS / PS1 aesthetic with low poly graphics and retro sound design

  • After only one autosave, you must find limited cassette tapes to save your progress
